title: Cups & Wine
body:
### ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MBrams/Cups-Wine/main/mnu.png)

## This is a fantasy modpack with a huge number of dungeons and things and weapons and armor and mobs mods

*   All weapons and equipment can be leveled up.
*   At the beginning of the game you can choose your class
*   You have an amulet that keeps things in itself after your death
*   There are many different spells scattered around the world that can be inserted into a magic book or applied to a weapon.
*   Updated combat system with Epic Fight and new movement system - Parcool
*   There are many different relics scattered around the world, each with their own special functions
